name: Jolly Buoy Island
description: The crown jewel of the Mahatma Gandhi Marine National Park — a pristine, uninhabited island with the most vibrant and intact coral reefs in the Andaman archipelago. Only 250 visitors are allowed per day, maintaining its immaculate condition.
history: Protected since 1983 under the MGMNP. The island alternates monthly with Red Skin Island to allow ecological recovery.
famousFor: World-class snorkeling, pristine coral gardens, glass-bottom boat rides.
